entries.name: Fire Bolt
entries.desc: A mote of fire streaks toward a target for ranged spell-attack fire damage that scales with level.

entries.name: Magic Missile
entries.desc: Three darts of force each strike a chosen target automatically for a small amount of damage.

entries.name: Shield
entries.desc: A reactive barrier grants a burst of extra armor class until the caster's next turn.

entries.name: Fireball
entries.desc: A bright streak blossoms into a fiery explosion; creatures in the area make a Dexterity save.
